---
title: "About"
toc: false
---

Practitioner-author writing on data science, marketing measurement, causal inference, and statistics.

Most of the content here is cross-posted from LinkedIn (short-form) or written as long-form articles and research papers. The full archive lives in a separate [content repository](https://github.com/UnbiasedEstimation/content); this site shows the curated subset.

## Topics

- Statistics (Bayesian / frequentist debates, confidence vs. credible intervals, prior elicitation)
- Causal inference (randomized experiments, A/B testing, synthetic control, MMM, geo-testing)
- Marketing measurement (incrementality, attribution, ROAS science)

## Find me elsewhere

- LinkedIn: [oliver-brose](https://www.linkedin.com/in/oliver-brose/)
- GitHub: [oliverbrose](https://github.com/oliverbrose)
- Org: [UnbiasedEstimation](https://github.com/UnbiasedEstimation)
